name: Clouded Mind

abilities.name: Wise Council
abilities.text: When this model activates, if there are three or more friendly Scheme markers in LoS, it may drain a (soulstone) or discard a card to replace this crew card with Clear Mind.

abilities.name: The Altar Grows Thirsty
abilities.text: When resolving friendly Hunger tokens, deal 1 damage to an enemy model to remove the token, instead of an ally.

abilities.name: Bound to Purpose
abilities.text: When this model declares the Interact action, it may gain a Hunger token to increase the Rg of the action by +2".

extraction_notes: The Altar Grows Thirsty appears to modify how Hunger tokens work globally for friendly models
